## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build or CI

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Frontend tests pass
- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Backend-only workflow verifier passes
- [ ] PX4 SITL workflow checked when applicable

## Safety Review

Does this affect mission upload, arm/disarm, start mission, telemetry, operator control, or future autonomous behavior?

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated when release-visible
- [ ] ADR added or updated for architecture decisions

## Notes

Add migration, rollback, deployment, or review notes.
